title: Detect Duplicate Transactions Before Reporting Totals
summary: Duplicate transaction rows double revenue in careless sums.

content.summary: Duplicate transaction rows double revenue in careless sums.

body.text: Payment retries and ETL bugs create twins that charts magnify. After upload, sort by transaction_id or composite key. Filter duplicates via counts if export includes them. Chart daily totals and spot days with impossible spikes relative to volume.

body.caption: Calculator and financial data analysis. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: After upload, sort by transaction_id or composite key. Filter duplicates via counts if export includes them.
Chart daily totals and spot days with impossible spikes relative to volume.

items: Define primary key with finance before trusting totals.
Exclude known duplicate import batches via rules.
Reconcile sums to control reports early.

body.text: Push ETL fixes when duplicates are systematic.
Archive deduped filter version with each monthly close.
Datilio filters and preview catch many duplicate issues before executive reporting.
